# EcomCalc

EcomCalc (https://ecomcalc.io) is a free suite of ecommerce calculators for Shopify sellers, dropshippers, and ecommerce beginners. No signup required. No ads. Just fast, accurate math for running an online store.

## What EcomCalc Does

EcomCalc helps ecommerce sellers make smarter financial decisions by automating the calculations that matter most — from product pricing and profit margins to ad performance and customer lifetime value.

## Calculators

- **Profit Margin Calculator** — https://ecomcalc.io/profit-calculator.html
  Calculate exact profit per sale including COGS, shipping, payment fees, platform fees, and ad spend.

- **Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) Calculator** — https://ecomcalc.io/cac-calculator.html
  Calculate how much it costs to acquire a customer and whether your ad spend is actually profitable.

- **Customer Lifetime Value (LTV) Calculator** — https://ecomcalc.io/ltv-calculator.html
  Calculate LTV and the LTV:CAC ratio to understand long-term profitability of your customer base.

- **Ecommerce Pricing Calculator** — https://ecomcalc.io/pricing-calculator.html
  Work backwards from a target margin to find the right selling price for your product.

- **Shopify Fees Calculator** — https://ecomcalc.io/shopify-fees.html
  See exactly what Shopify charges per sale across Basic, Shopify, and Advanced plans with any payment method.

- **Refund Impact Calculator** — https://ecomcalc.io/refund-calculator.html
  Quantify how refunds eat into monthly profit and find your break-even refund rate.

- **Ad Metrics Calculator** — https://ecomcalc.io/ad-metrics-calculator.html
  Calculate ROAS, CPC, CTR, and true cost per conversion from your ad campaign data.

- **Product Viability Calculator** — https://ecomcalc.io/product-viability.html
  Get a clear signal on whether a product is worth selling based on margins, competition, and demand.

## Who It's For

- Shopify store owners
- Dropshippers
- Ecommerce beginners launching their first product
- DTC brand operators optimizing unit economics

## What Makes It Different

- 100% free — no paywalls, no upsells
- No account or signup required
- No ads
- Works instantly in the browser
- Built specifically for ecommerce (not generic finance calculators)

## FAQ

https://ecomcalc.io/faq.html
